goal: Find one or more new orthogonal signals that independently add informational value and improve the base system without cannibalizing it.
global_constraints: Base system active-signal-v1@1 is frozen — never modify its rules, thresholds, hours, days, or execution logic.
Only genuinely new signal classes are allowed — no retuning, permutation, or filter relaxation of existing base inputs.
Every hypothesis must pass the full funnel: standalone → stability → integration → cannibalization → final report.
No brute-force parameter search; use small logical grids only.
All negative, neutral, and positive results must be recorded in research memory.
Cannibalism must be explicitly measured before any promotion.

slices.title: Быстрый отбор через signal plausibility и feature profitability
slices.hypothesis: Before expensive backtests, discard hypotheses that look empty, unstable, or too similar to the base at the feature level.
slices.objective: Before expensive backtests, discard hypotheses that look empty, unstable, or too similar to the base at the feature level.
success_criteria: Only hypotheses with preliminary signal plausibility and expected orthogonality remain.
evidence_requirements: Only hypotheses with preliminary signal plausibility and expected orthogonality remain.

slices.title: Standalone backtests новых сигналов
slices.hypothesis: Determine whether each surviving hypothesis has independent trading value before any integration with the base.
slices.objective: Determine whether each surviving hypothesis has independent trading value before any integration with the base.
success_criteria: Short-list of standalone candidates that are non-empty on their own.
evidence_requirements: Short-list of standalone candidates that are non-empty on their own.

slices.title: Stability и condition analysis
slices.hypothesis: Filter out attractive but locally fragile signals; keep only those that survive window decomposition or honestly qualify as specialist signals for a specific missing regime.
slices.objective: Filter out attractive but locally fragile signals; keep only those that survive window decomposition or honestly qualify as specialist signals for a specific missing regime.
success_criteria: Remaining signals are either broadly stable or honestly proven as specialist signals for a missing regime.
evidence_requirements: Remaining signals are either broadly stable or honestly proven as specialist signals for a missing regime.
